framing: as-carved gangsaw cut-from (aligned 0.5 m grid = guillotine-separable by construction)
repack_note: Block Pack (Tree) re-nesting of the 100 fabricable (>=1L) loose pieces places 83/100 into a 12 m3 block; the tree packer is tuned for <50 elements (Kim 2025 tested 45). For 100+ pieces batch by region or keep the as-carved plan.
